trivia_bullets.text: Brimstone Trebuchet is the only Wall in ELD (October 2019), fitting the siege-warfare imagery of Eldraine's five knightly courts without belonging to any single one. Its type line Artifact Creature — Wall is unique in the set.
The untap trigger 'whenever a Knight you control enters' is a synergy bridge making the trebuchet require active knight deployment to be useful — rewarding Embereth-flavored aggressive builds.
Illustrated by Yeong-Hao Han. No flavor text on this printing.

related_cards.name: Fervent Champion
related_cards.note: One-mana knight that untaps the trebuchet on entry; same set, same knight-synergy package

related_cards.name: Rimrock Knight
related_cards.note: Dwarf Knight; another knight triggering the untap; shares the Embereth-adjacent military flavor

related_cards.name: Embereth Shieldbreaker
related_cards.note: Named Embereth knight sharing court identity with the trebuchet's fortification imagery
